problem id: 562cfc29
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  01100010 -> 01000110
  01100110 -> 01010100
  00011101 -> 00000101
  01111111 -> 10111100
  00010000 -> 10110111
  11101001 -> 10101111
  00011001 -> 00010111
  10111000 -> 01000011

query: 01100101
predicted answer: 11011001
